name: Animatic Discover
description: Four-in-one gallery experience for Animatic: Primitive Gallery with live CSS animation previews and faceted filtering, Rendered Showcase Gallery with filmstrip-scrub hover, Contact Sheet Browser with expandable frame details, all wrapped in a dark gallery chrome with personality-switching accent colors. Inspired by Kive.ai's visual-first discovery pattern.
prompt: /prototype all — primitive gallery, rendered showcase, contact sheet browser, dark gallery chrome shell

versions.notes: Single-page tabbed experience with all four views. 22 primitives with live CSS animations (play on hover), 8 showcase cards with gradient filmstrip scrub, 3 contact sheets with click-to-expand frame details. Personality accent switcher tints all accent-colored elements across the entire UI.
